review_notes: The functions accurately map to Kubernetes RBAC security controls, which are relevant to the PCI DSS control 2.1.1 focusing on security policies and operational procedures. The naming conventions are mostly followed, but there is room for slight improvement in clarity.
naming_improvements: Consider using 'k8s_rbac_service_account_token_automount_disabled' to 'k8s_rbac_service_account_token_automount_not_used' for clearer pass/fail indication.
title: Examine documentation and interview personnel to verify that security policies and operational pr...
step1_reasoning: The control 2.1.1 focuses on verifying security policies and operational procedures, which can be mapped to ensuring proper access control and privilege management in Kubernetes. The equivalent checks in Kubernetes involve ensuring that no overly permissive roles are bound (e.g., cluster-admin), enforcing least privilege principles, and managing service account tokens securely.
